subject: Infrastructure Blocker: dev2 BDV2 Deployment Broken

content.summary: Layer 2 validation for Session Management (clawd-1il) is complete for code/unit tests but browser testing is blocked by dev2 infrastructure issue.

what_works: Implementation verified correct via code analysis
details.root_cause: dev2 has NextAuth version mismatch - getServerSession export not found during build
details.fix_needed: Clean reinstall of node_modules on dev2 with correct lockfile, then rebuild

content.recommendation: Create infrastructure ticket. Implementation is production-ready per code review.
content.impact: Cannot complete Layer 2 browser validation for auth stories until fixed
